description: Display a temporary positioned annotation that appears for a configurable duration. Content is in PLAIN TEXT mode by default — math expressions must be wrapped in math() to render as math. Supports anchor-based, absolute, or logical positioning with color, font size, and background styling.
utility: Display positioned annotation comments with optional styling

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Position using at() - can reference shapes, anchor points, or absolute coordinates

arguments.name: text
arguments.description: Comment text in quotes - supports ASCII math syntax

arguments.name: fontSize
arguments.description: Font size in pixels - e.g., fs(24)

alternates.description: Comment at center of shape M
Comment at right edge of M (anchor 4)
Comment at right edge + 0.5 unit offset
Comment below shape with vertical offset
Comment at top-left corner of M
Colored comment with custom font size

examples.expression: comment_2 = comment(at(point_1, type(right)), "comment", buff(0.2, 0.5), fs(20), c(orange), fc(black))

examples.scenario: Comment on write for point-slope formula
